title: Integrity Code Series - Week 10 - NNpHSCC Full-Physics Simulation
description:
Full-physics simulation of Near-Neutral pH Stress Corrosion Cracking (NNpHSCC) in gas transmission pipelines. Implements 15 coupled mechanisms in a single audit-chained pipeline:

  • Laplace soil electrochemistry with Butler-Volmer boundary conditions
  • Oriani-Fick hydrogen diffusion with trap-corrected effective diffusivity
  • Chen-Sutherby-Xing combined-parameter crack-growth law with frequency saturation at f_crit = 10^-3 Hz
  • Newman-Raju 3D semi-elliptical crack geometry (coupled (a, c) ODEs)
  • BS 7910:2019 Annex Q residual stress SIF for as-welded HAZ
  • BS 7910:2019 Cl. 7.3 coalescence rule for adjacent surface cracks
  • Turnbull (1993) crack-tip pH model with Fe2+ hydrolysis and CO2/HCO3- buffering
  • Non-monotonic CP potential model (minimum CGR at -750 mV CSE)
  • Microstructure zones: base metal, HAZ, vintage X52 base, vintage X52 ERW seam weld
  • Zhao (2017) Stage I to Stage II dormancy transition criterion
  • Latin Hypercube Monte Carlo with 8 sampled parameters, POD-corrected initial flaw depth
  • Sun, Zhou and Kang (2021) model structural uncertainty (COV = 61.2%) as sampled epistemic variable
  • Straub (2004) Bayesian particle-filter posterior update from re-inspection events
  • API 579-1 Level 2 FAD assessment
  • ASME B31.8 / B31.12 MAOP comparison and Cui (2024) H2-blending K_IH degradation

Outputs are SHA-256 hash-chained for audit traceability. The package ships 215 unit and integration tests and benchmarks against Faraday law, Newman-Raju K_I and Weibull POD.

The release addresses PHMSA 192.611(a)(4) class-location-change integrity assessment requirements that took effect March 16, 2026.
references: Chen W., Sutherby R.L. (2007). Crack growth behaviour of pipeline steel in near-neutral pH soil environments. Metallurgical and Materials Transactions A 38A: 1260-1268.

Sun J., Zhou W., Kang J. (2021). A combined model for the prediction of stress corrosion crack growth rate of pipelines in near-neutral pH environments. Journal of Infrastructure Preservation and Resilience 2:6.
Newman J.C., Raju I.S. (1981). An empirical stress-intensity factor equation for the surface crack. Engineering Fracture Mechanics 15(1-2): 185-192.
BSI (2019). BS 7910:2019 Guide to methods for assessing the acceptability of flaws in metallic structures.
Turnbull A. (1993). Modelling of environment assisted cracking. Corrosion Science 34(6): 921-960.
Zhao W. et al. (2017). Dormancy transition criterion for SCC initiation under cyclic loading. Corrosion Science.
Straub D. (2004). Generic approaches to risk-based inspection planning for steel structures. ETH Zurich.
API (2025). API RP 581 Risk-Based Inspection Methodology, 4th Edition.
ASME (2020). ASME B31.8 Gas Transmission and Distribution Piping Systems.
ASME (2019). ASME B31.12 Hydrogen Piping and Pipelines.
Cui J. et al. (2024). K_IH degradation in pipeline steels under H2 blending.
PHMSA 49 CFR 192.611 Change in class location: confirmation or revision of MAOP.
